name: Macaroni Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/3 Cup black olives, halved and pitted
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the macaroni with oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper until smooth.
2. Toss the mixture lightly to combine all ingredients.
3. Allow the salad to cool thoroughly in the refrigerator.
4. Steam the frankfurters for 5 to 10 minutes, then cool and dice them.
5. Combine the cooled macaroni, diced frankfurters, olives, cucumber, celery, green onions, pickle, and pimiento in a large bowl.
6. Add the mayonnaise and mix gently until all ingredients are evenly coated.
7. Chill the salad in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
